rss.channel:
朝九晚五 https://9to5mac.com/ Apple 新闻和 Mac 谣言全天爆发2026 年 3 月 31 日星期二 04:04:43 +0000 en-US每小时1 https://wordpress.org/?v=6.9.4 https://9to5mac.com/wp-content/uploads/sites/6/2019/10/cropped-cropped-mac1-1.png?w=32朝九晚五https://9to5mac.com/ 32 32 146091842 Opera Neon 通过 MCP 支持加倍加强代理浏览https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/31/opera-neon-doubles-down-on-agentic-browsing-with-mcp-support/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/31/opera-neon-doubles-down-on-agentic-browsing-with-mcp-support/#respondMarcus Mendes Tue, 31 Mar 2026 08:00:00 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045944

Opera 的代理浏览器现在允许用户将 AI 工具直接连接到他们的实时浏览会话，使他们能够访问选项卡、与页面交互并实时采取操作。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/31/opera-neon-doubles-down-on-agentic-browsing-with-mcp-support/feed/ 0 1045944 苹果引入了第三方访问通知和实时活动的隐私规则https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-introduces-privacy-rules-for-third-party-access-to-notifications-and-live-activities/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-introduces-privacy-rules-for-third-party-access-to-notifications-and-live-activities/#respondMarcus Mendes Tue, 31 Mar 2026 03:21:46 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045925

Apple更新了其开发者计划许可协议，其中包含有关第三方配件必须如何处理转发的通知和实时活动的新规则。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-introduces-privacy-rules-for-third-party-access-to-notifications-and-live-activities/feed/ 0 1045925 第九巡回法院一致拒绝苹果公司在 Epic Games 案件中的重审请求https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ninth- Circuit-unanimously-denies-apples-rehearing-requests-in-epic-games-case/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ninth- Circuit-unanimously-denies-apples-rehearing-requests-in-epic-games-case/#respondMarcus Mendes Tue, 31 Mar 2026 02:14:51 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045907

苹果今天在针对 Epic Games 的案件中遭受了重大挫折，第九巡回法院驳回了其两项重审请求。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ninth- Circuit-unanimously-denies-apples-rehearing-requests-in-epic-games-case/feed/ 0 1045907 苹果 3 月份停止销售 14 款产品，其中 3 款产品没有替代品https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-stopped- sell-14-products-in-march-include-3-with-no-replacements/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-stopped-looking-14-products-in-march-include-3-with-no-replacements/#commentsZac Hall Tue, 31 Mar 2026 01:31:51 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045887

苹果本月推出了大量新硬件。新款 iPhone、iPad、Mac 等设备为您带来难忘的三月体验。苹果本月还停产了许多产品——不仅仅是为了给新硬件腾出空间。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-stopped- sell-14-products-in-march-include-3-with-no-replacements/feed/ 1 1045887 苹果子公司因违反俄罗斯制裁规则在英国被罚款https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-subsidiary-fined-in-the-uk-for-breaching-Russia-sanctions-rules/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-subsidiary-fined-in-the-uk-for-breaching-Russia-sanctions-rules/#respondMarcus Mendes Tue, 31 Mar 2026 01:19:13 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045890

在入侵乌克兰后，英国因违反俄罗斯制裁而对苹果子公司处以超过 50 万美元的罚款。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-subsidiary-fined-in-the-uk-for-breaching-Russia-sanctions-rules/feed/ 0 1045890 iOS 26.5 beta 1：以下是所有新功能https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-beta-1-here-are-all-the-new-features/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-beta-1-here-are-all-the-new-features/#commentsChance Miller Tue, 31 Mar 2026 00:38:04 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045877

Apple 今天为开发者发布了 iOS 26.5 beta 1 。此次更新不包括任何备受期待的 Siri 新功能，但有一些值得注意的变化。请参阅下文，了解 iOS 26.5 beta 1 中所有新内容的完整摘要。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-beta-1-here-are-all-the-new-features/feed/ 1 1045877 WhatsApp 正在开发专用的 CarPlay 应用程序，现已可供 Beta 测试者使用https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/whatsapp-is-working-on-a-dedicated-carplay-app-available-now-for-beta-testers/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/whatsapp-is-working-on-a-dedicated-carplay-app-available-now-for-beta-testers/#commentsMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 23:33:53 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045869

基于 TestFlight 的最新 WhatsApp Beta 版引入了原生 CarPlay 应用程序，将该应用程序的实用性扩展到当前基于语音的界面之外。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/whatsapp-is-working-on-a-dedicated-carplay-app-available-now-for-beta-testers/feed/ 1 1045869 MagSafe Monday：ESR 5 卡钱包比苹果的 FineWoven 钱包更好吗？ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/is-the-esr-5-card-wallet-better-than-apple-finewriting/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/is-the-esr-5-card-wallet-better-than-apple-finewriting/#commentsBradley C Mon, 30 Mar 2026 23:01:00 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1043272

多年来我尝试过许多 MagSafe 钱包，但尚未找到完美的一款。在使用Apple FineWoven 钱包几周后，我决定换成 ESR 的五卡 MagSafe 钱包（黑色）。虽然 ESR 选项支持五张卡片，但与 FineWoven 版本的三张卡片相比，它肯定要厚得多。尽管体积较大，但由于其独立的 ID 插槽和可容纳多张卡的能力，它很快就成为我目前的日常携带物品。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/is-the-esr-5-card-wallet-better-than-apple-finewriting/feed/ 1 1043272 苹果加大对vibe编码应用的打击力度，从App Store下架“Anything” https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-steps-up-crackdown-on-vibe-coding-apps-pulls-anything-from-the-app-store/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-steps-up-crackdown-on-vibe-coding-apps-pulls-anything-from-the-app-store/#commentsMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 22:30:01 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045859

据The Information报道，苹果公司上周从 App Store 下架了 Vibe 编码应用程序“ Anything ”，理由是其应用程序审查指南中的自我遏制规则。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-steps-up-crackdown-on-vibe-coding-apps-pulls-anything-from-the-app-store/feed/ 10 1045859 苹果在欧盟测试第三方配件的自动音频切换https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-testing-automatic-audio-switching-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-testing-automatic-audio-switching-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/#respondMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 21:53:50 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045834

随着苹果不断做出改变以遵守欧盟的数字市场法案，苹果正在测​​试一个新框架，该框架可为第三方音频配件带来自动音频切换功能。以下是详细信息。

更多... ; https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/apple-testing-automatic-audio-switching-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/feed/ 0 1045834 iOS 26.5 增加了对欧盟第三方配件的实时活动支持https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-live-activities-support-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/ https://9to5mac.com/2026/03/30/ios-26-5-adds-live-activities-support-for-third-party-accessories-in-the-eu/#respondMarcus Mendes Mon, 30 Mar 2026 20:41:24 +0000News https://9to5mac.com/?p=1045821

根据 9to5Mac 看到的新代码，苹果正在努力在欧洲的 iOS 26.5 中支持第三方配件中的实时活动。以下是详细信息。
